intro: Government and technology sectors in the United States were the primary targets in a series of five high-severity incidents tagged kev, documented between April 12 and April 25, 2026. The coverage includes two critical and three high-severity vulnerabilities, with specific attention to CVE-2024-57726, which carries a CVSS score of 9.9, along with CVE-2024-20662 and CVE-2024-21412. These exploits were observed affecting organizations across the government and technology sectors, underscoring the concentrated risk to these industries during the reporting period.
